agribalyse.name_en: Soup, Asian-style with noodles, dehydrated and reconstituted

ingredients_text: Noodle (83%) [wheat flour, palm fat, tapioca, modified starch, salt, sugar, stabilizers (triphosphates, guar gum); raising agents (potassium carbonates, sodium carbonates); turmeric]; soup base (17%) [refined palm oil, sugar, salt, flavour enhancers (monosodium glutamate, disodium guanylate, disodium inosinate), dried vegetables (6%) (cabbage, carrot, leek), maltodextrin, flavouring (_eggs_, _fish_, _soybeans_), red chilli pepper (3%), garlic, ginger, chilli (1%), thickener: guar gum; acidity regulator: citric acid, colour: carotenes, antioxidant: E306]
